title: Breakeven
why_this_song: Breakeven by The Script (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Just prayed to a God that I don't believe in"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I'm falling to pieces, yeah"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I'm falling to pieces, yeah"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "'Cause I got time while she got freedom"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "'Cause when a heart breaks, no, it don't breakeven"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "falling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "falling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing
And what am I gonna do

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause I got time while she got freedom
And what am I supposed to say

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Script one question about "Breakeven", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Script sobre "Breakeven", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Breakeven" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Breakeven" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Breakeven" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Breakeven" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
